## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hypergrowth and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy and LinkedIn performance](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent LinkedIn posts getting high-quality engagement from industry leaders, but lower overall distribution](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Planning to experiment with reposting/reframing content to boost reach while maintaining quality engagement](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Will analyze top performers' LinkedIn strategies to inform optimization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Preparing to onboard new collaborator (Gonto) and align content approach](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

## Topics

### LinkedIn Content Performance

  - [Recent posts getting engagement from high-profile figures (e.g. former Shopify co-author, Etsy CMO)](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Lower overall distribution (2k-12k views) but higher quality engagement than initially planned](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Experimenting with Unicode, links - some tradeoffs in reach](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Team agrees high-level engagement aligns better with business goals than broad reach](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### Content Repurposing Strategy

  - [Considering reposting/reframing recent content to boost reach](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Will maintain original posts to preserve valuable comments](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Approach: Create new posts referencing previous discussions, tag commenters](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [Challenge: Balancing desire for increased reach with preserving quality engagement](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### LinkedIn Optimization Plan

  - [Team to identify 10-15 admired LinkedIn performers in relevant field](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze last 10 posts from each, looking for engagement patterns](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Will examine: frequency, length, images, links, Unicode usage, structure](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Goal: Extract actionable insights to improve post performance](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Upcoming Content Collaboration

  - [Gonto (new collaborator) excited to work with team](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Preparing to align tone/voice between Guillaume and Gonto's content](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Team to review Gonto's podcast, past writing for style reference](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Brenda to help coordinate upcoming call with Gonto](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)

### Content Pipeline

  - [Podcast recording from yesterday available for potential piece](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Financial planning content on hold (too data-heavy for current approach)](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Will explore Gonto's audio snippet for possible content direction](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Giulia to share audio snippet and notes from Gonto for content exploration](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Team to review Substack performance, select pieces for LinkedIn repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Giulia and Guillaume to compile list of 10-15 LinkedIn profiles for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze identified LinkedIn profiles, extract optimization insights](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Schedule call with Gonto to align on content approach and style](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Jenn offered final edit on pieces before publishing - team to utilize as needed](https://fathom.video/share/aWDaTHGWMis7PUAUNRm5DVvPxZfCyrbw?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
